Corporate Social Responsibility Approach

Kadir Has University continues responsible, ethical, productive, innovative, and environmentally friendly investments for a sustainable future, following the path of its founder, Mr. Kadir Has, who is known for philanthrophic activities. By adopting management strategies based on social, environmental, and ethical values ​​in our activities, we assume responsibility for our students and academic and administrative staff and voluntarily produce pioneering solutions to problems.

Kadir Has University aims to be a leading university in the field of Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) in Turkey and the international academic world. In line with this vision:

We develop the capacity of our students, who are the leaders of the future, to create added value in work and the society;

We conduct scientific research in the field of Corporate Social Responsibility,

We develop training modules in the field of CSR for the business world, non-governmental organizations, and other stakeholders,

To contribute to the economic, social, and environmental development of the region where the university is located, we carry out activities such as developing cooperation with stakeholders by ensuring stakeholder dialogue in CSR.

Kadir Has University signed the

,

the world’s largest voluntary corporate citizenship initiative

,

in July 2009.
